untranslatable_reason: Signal requires: (1) RS indicator uptrend detection via 50-period uptrend line — no uptrend line indicator available in allowed set; (2) Industry group rank in top 50 — no sector/group ranking indicator available; (3) Confirmation candle logic (second consecutive close) — cannot express multi-bar sequential conditions with available operators; (4) 'Relative Strength' appears to reference a custom momentum metric distinct from RSI, but exact calculation not specified. Closest approximation uses rsi_14 as momentum proxy, but this loses the core signal intent around trend-of-trend deterioration.
translation_notes: The original signal pivots on deteriorating RS momentum (trend of the trend) detected via break of uptrend line, coupled with industry ranking filters. Without a dedicated uptrend-line or trend-detection primitive, and without sector rank data, the translation is incomplete. Used rsi_14 > 80 as entry filter (strong momentum) and crosses_below sma_50 as a crude exit approximation, but this does not capture the nuanced 'uptrend break with confirmation' logic that is central to the signal.
